about.title: About
about.body: Founded in 2003, SIGNEX specializes in manufacturing soft plastic brand identity components made from export-standard materials that are odorless, non-toxic, highly durable, and precisely detailed for the garment, consumer goods, and advertising industries. Since 2016, SIGNEX products have been supplied to international markets, including Europe, Japan, and the United States.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.body: To manufacture reliable brand identity components that help businesses present their brand clearly and consistently across products and markets.
items: Delivering consistent manufacturing quality across every production batch
Supporting brands with reliable OEM manufacturing solutions
Maintaining precise brand standards in every component produced
Building long-term manufacturing partnerships with our clients

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.body: To become a trusted manufacturing partner for global brands, delivering consistent brand identity components with reliability, precision, and long-term cooperation.

values.title: Our Values
values.body: Integrity, ethics, and quality form the foundation for sustainable growth in all of SIGNEX's manufacturing activities.

products.title: What We
products.body: Produced with premium-grade PVC, TPU, silicone, and composite materials, ensuring durability, color stability, and accurate brand representation.

categories.title: Plastic logos & emblems
categories.intro: Molded and printed plastic brand marks engineered to hold crisp logo geometry and stable color through repeated wash and wear. From soft-PVC patches to silicone heat-transfers and 3D domed emblems, each piece is tooled to your brand spec and finished for apparel, footwear, bags, and accessories.

items.title: Soft-PVC logo patch
items.desc: Flexible 2D or 3D soft-PVC patch with sharp molded detail and a sew-on or heat-seal backing for garments and caps.

items.title: Silicone heat-transfer logo
items.desc: Thin, stretchable silicone mark heat-pressed directly onto fabric for a clean, tagless branded finish.

items.title: 3D domed resin emblem
items.desc: Printed insert sealed under a glossy doming resin for a raised, scratch-resistant emblem on bags and accessories.

items.title: Rubberized PU badge
items.desc: Multi-layer rubberized PU badge with embossed edges, giving a soft-touch feel and strong color contrast.

items.title: Injection-molded logo trim
items.desc: Hard injection-molded TPU logo with precise edges and fixing posts for footwear and structured bags.

items.title: Embossed PVC label
items.desc: Tonal embossed PVC label with raised lettering and stitch channels for a subtle, durable brand mark.

categories.title: Labels, badges, nameplates
categories.intro: Woven, printed and heat-pressed identity trims that carry your brand mark, care information and sizing directly on the garment — produced to consistent specification, batch after batch.

items.title: Woven Damask Brand Label
items.desc: High-density damask weave with crisp logo definition and a soft hand-feel for main and neck labels.

items.title: Printed Satin Care Label
items.desc: Smooth satin ribbon printed with wash-care symbols, fiber content and country of origin.

items.title: Folded Size & Care Tab
items.desc: Center-fold or end-fold size and care tabs with clean cut edges, sewn into seams or side panels.

items.title: Heat-Transfer Label
items.desc: Tagless heat-transfer labels pressed directly onto the fabric for soft, irritation-free care marking.

items.title: Engraved Metal Nameplate
items.desc: Engraved or etched zinc and brass nameplates with electroplated finish for bags and outerwear.

items.title: Embroidered Badge
items.desc: Dense machine-embroidered badges with merrowed or laser-cut borders and iron-on or sew-on backing.

categories.title: Custom identity components
categories.intro: Bespoke metal and molded trims engineered to your brand specification, from zipper pulls to rivets and snaps. Each component is tooled to order in zinc alloy, brass, TPU, or soft PVC with custom finishes, logos, and engraving for a consistent identity across every garment.

items.title: Branded zipper pulls
items.desc: Die-cast zinc-alloy pulls shaped to your logo with electroplated or matte finishes for jackets, bags, and outerwear.

items.title: Engraved metal buttons
items.desc: Solid brass shank and tack buttons with laser-engraved or embossed brand marks in antique, nickel, or gunmetal plating.

items.title: Custom logo buckles
items.desc: Made-to-spec side-release and slide buckles cast in zinc or molded in acetal, debossed with your mark for straps and webbing.

items.title: Logo rivets & studs
items.desc: Double-cap rivets and decorative studs with a stamped logo head, finished in brass, copper, or black nickel for denim and leather goods.

items.title: Branded cord stoppers
items.desc: Injection-molded spring cord stoppers and aglets in soft PVC or TPU, raised with a 3D logo and matched to brand Pantone colors.

items.title: Logo eyelets & snaps
items.desc: Self-piercing eyelets, grommets, and ring-spring snap fasteners engraved with your logo in nickel, brass, or matte-black plating.

categories.title: OEM brand parts
categories.intro: OEM brand parts produced to your exact spec sheet — co-developed trim sets, private-label labels, and branded hardware kits matched to your brand standards. We build to drawing, color, and tolerance, then deliver consistently at production scale.

items.title: Spec-matched trim set
items.desc: A coordinated set of labels, tags, and hardware co-developed and color-matched to your brand spec sheet for a single garment program.

items.title: Private-label woven label
items.desc: A damask-woven main label produced under your own private label, with brand-locked colors, fonts, and folding to your tech pack.

items.title: Branded hardware kit
items.desc: A packaged kit of branded zipper pullers, rivets, and snaps die-cast and electroplated to your logo and finish standard.

items.title: Co-developed leather patch
items.desc: A debossed leather patch developed jointly with your design team, with hide grade, edge finish, and stitch spec fixed to drawing.

items.title: OEM heat-transfer label
items.desc: A heat-transferred care and brand label built to your TPU film, wash-test, and placement spec for high-volume runs.

items.title: Custom metal logo plate
items.desc: An etched brass logo plate manufactured to your CAD file, plating tone, and mounting method as a dedicated OEM component.

contact.subtitle: Have questions? We're here to help you succeed.

hero.title: About
hero.subtitle: Manufacturing Brand Identity Excellence Since Inception

testimonial.title: Who We
body: SIGNEX is a leading manufacturer specializing in brand identity products. We don't just create brands – we manufacture what brands stand for.

With state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities and a dedicated team of experts, we deliver precision-crafted plastic logos, emblems, labels, badges, nameplates, and custom identity components for global brands.
Our commitment to quality, innovation, and customer satisfaction has made us a trusted partner for businesses seeking excellence in brand representation.
From OEM parts to custom solutions, we bring your brand identity to life through superior manufacturing processes and attention to detail.

approach.title: Direct Manufacturing
body: SIGNEX operates as a direct manufacturer with production managed entirely in-house.
This ensures clear technical communication, full production control, and stable quality across manufacturing batches.

approach.title: Brand-Oriented Manufacturing
body: We understand that brand components are not generic parts.

Our manufacturing approach is therefore aligned with brand requirements, ensuring that each component respects established brand guidelines and maintains a consistent appearance across different production runs.

approach.title: OEM & Confidentiality
body: We believe in building lasting relationships with our clients. Our partnership approach ensures consistent quality, reliable delivery, and continuous improvement.
We maintain transparent communication with our partners to ensure reliability, clarity in technical requirements, and long-term manufacturing stability.

intro.title: Why Choose
intro.body: Excellence in every detail, quality in every product

capability.title: Manufacturing
capability.body: SIGNEX focuses on OEM and custom brand identity manufacturing, with production capabilities designed to meet both technical specifications and brand requirements.

groups.title: Core Products
items: Custom identity components for products and packaging
OEM brand parts made to specification

groups.title: Production Strengths
items: Consistent surface finishing and color control
Adaptability for small to medium production volumes

closing: We do not pursue mass production at the expense of control.
Our focus is manufacturing accuracy and stability, batch after batch.

process.title: Manufacturing
process.body: Excellence in every detail, quality in every product

steps.title: Material Selection & Formulation
steps.body: Materials are selected and prepared according to performance requirements and product specifications.

steps.title: Mold Development & Tooling
steps.body: Precision molds are developed to ensure accurate form reproduction and stable long-term production.

steps.title: Production & Forming
steps.body: Components are manufactured under controlled parameters to maintain consistent shape, surface quality, and color.

steps.title: Quality Inspection
steps.body: Each batch undergoes visual and dimensional inspection to ensure it meets defined standards.

timeline.title: Manufacturing Process
timeline.body: Our manufacturing process follows a structured, repeatable workflow
intro: SIGNEX operates as a direct manufacturing company, with production activities conducted under controlled conditions to ensure consistency and quality stability.
Our factory setup focuses on precision forming, material handling, and repeatable production, rather than mass output.
We invest in process control, not scale for scale's sake.

milestones.title: Material Selection & Preparation
milestones.body: Materials are selected based on performance requirements, durability, and brand application, including PVC, TPU, silicone, and composite plastics.

about.title: About Us
